title: Stage 08 Deploy Gate
description: Stage 8 (Deploy) gate. Authored by dev-platform after running the selected deploy adapter. PASS requires status PASS AND smoke_tests_passed true. The adapter-specific result lives in an additional 'adapter_result' object; see core/deploy/<adapter>.md for its shape.

deploy_completed.description: The selected deploy adapter completed its procedure without halt.

smoke_tests_passed.description: Post-deploy smoke tests passed. Required true for PASS.

rollback_executed.description: True if the role rolled back during deploy (per the adapter's procedure). PASS allowed only when this is false; a rollback halts the pipeline.

deploy_adapter.description: Which deploy adapter ran (docker-compose, kubernetes, terraform, custom). Distinct from the top-level 'host' field which is the AI-tool adapter.

environment.description: Target environment for the deploy (adapter-specific shape).

runbook_referenced.description: Confirms pipeline/runbook.md was referenced in the deploy-log. A missing runbook ESCALATEs at Stage 8 start, before deploy runs.
